title: Services
description: Manage your service catalog, transport rules, and booking custom fields.

toast.customFieldDeleteConflict: This custom field can't be deleted because it's still used by existing bookings.

formDialog.descEdit: Update the service here. Click save when you're done.
formDialog.butuhTransportDesc: Enable if this service requires an additional transport fee.

list.title: Service List
list.description: All services available in your catalog.
list.loadError: Failed to load services. Try reloading the page.
list.empty: No services yet. Click "Add Service" to create your first one.

transport.title: Transport Rule
transport.description: Set the transport fee added to the booking total.
transport.loadError: Failed to load the transport rule. Try reloading the page.
transport.zonaEmpty: No zones yet. Click "Add Zone" to create your first one.

customField.title: Booking Custom Fields
customField.description: Additional questions shown on the booking form.
